inputs: One authored prompt sent through a BYOK OpenRouter chat-completions model config, graded by regex and case-insensitive-contains rubrics (backlog 017).
outputs: Model text graded by a regex pattern and a case-insensitive contains rubric.
decision: Prove the broadened deterministic grader library (Regex, CaseInsensitiveContains) is real: declared, validated, and routed by the same runner as Exact/Contains.

config.system_prompt: You are executing a benchmark smoke test. Follow the user instruction directly and keep the answer short.

tasks.prompt: Reply with a fake US phone number in the exact format 555-1234, nothing else.
Reply with one short sentence that includes the word CRUCIBLE-SMOKE in any capitalization.
